text: Morning Jarvis. What's my agenda for this Saturday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, August 24. No work meetings today. You have gardening in the front walkway and neighborhood BBQ at Dave's place.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Hey Jarvis, Listening to a podcast in the garage. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. Personal time is valuable. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick update: The smart-home hub is acting up today. I think the spark plug on the mower is dirty. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Got it, Mike. Let's get that resolved. I can look up a quick spark plug cleaning guide for your mower model. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Jarvis, Having dinner with our friends tonight. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Interesting. I've mapped the locations. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Researching rover power systems in depth. Building humidity sensors for the greenhouse. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. I've indexed the research notes. ESP32 sensor soldering is a fun project. I can fetch pinout diagrams. Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Prepping school lunches for the week. Packing turkey sandwiches and apples for Ethan. The kids are always hungry.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Interesting. I've got the grocery list ready. Looks balanced. I can set a morning reminder to grab it from the fridge. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick update: Ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Lily blew bubbles without crying during her swim lessons. The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sure thing! I've got the schedule covered. That's a major swim milestone! Her confidence is really building. I'll track the schedule.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Jarvis, We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Toddlers are full of energy. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Listening to a podcast in the garage. My starting running back is questionable. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: Sure thing! Relaxation mode active. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick log: The lawn mower is having issues starting. I think the spark plug on the mower is dirty. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Logged that. Automations are great when they work. I can look up a quick spark plug cleaning guide for your mower model. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Jarvis, We got invited to a neighbor's house. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Interesting. Catan is always a good time. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. I can suggest more board games.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Soldering custom sensors in the garage. I aligned it and tracked Jupiter's moons. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. I checked the telemetry feeds. Jupiter tracking is a classic target! I've saved the coordinate parameters. I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: Prepping school lunches for the week. Packing turkey sandwiches and apples for Ethan. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Sure thing! Healthy choices are great. Looks balanced. I can set a morning reminder to grab it from the fridge. Enjoy the grilling tonight!
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Just wanted to mention that we went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. Lily's gymnastics class signup opens online tomorrow. Always coordinate calendars for these.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Logged that. I've got the schedule covered. I've added the signup time to your alerts so you can secure a spot. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Jarvis, Ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Screen time is always a negotiation. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update before bed, logging the journal. Relaxing Sunday spending time with Sarah and the kids. Spent some quality time stargazing with the telescope. Spent some quality time stargazing with the telescope. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal summary recorded. Have a peaceful night.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
